mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.deleted_yn = 'N' THEN d.device_id END) AS totalDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.deleted_yn = 'N' AND d.status != 'OFFLINE' THEN d.device_id END) AS operatingDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.deleted_yn = 'N' AND d.status = 'OFFLINE' THEN d.device_id END) AS offlineDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN el.log_id IS NOT NULL THEN d.device_id END) AS loggedDeviceCount,
COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN d.deleted_yn = 'Y' THEN d.device_id END) AS deletedDeviceCount,
IFNULL(SUM(el.daily_kwh), 0) AS monthlyGenerationKwh,
IFNULL(SUM(el.cost), 0) AS monthlySavedCost,
IFNULL(AVG(el.efficiency), 0) AS averageEfficiency
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN energy_log el ON d.device_id = el.device_id AND DATE_FORMAT(el.log_date, '%Y-%m') = #{selectedMonth}
WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId}
AND d.install_date <= LAST_DAY( STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT(#{selectedMonth}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d' ) )
AND ( d.deleted_yn = 'N' OR d.deleted_at >= STR_TO_DATE( CONCAT(#{selectedMonth}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d' ) )
AND d.group_id = #{groupId}
AND d.device_id = #{deviceId}
SELECT group_id, group_name FROM ess_device_group WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY group_id ASC
